ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – 10:00 PM to 11:30 PM IST – Please Note
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope you are doing well. As part of our ongoing efforts to enhance security and performance, the corporate VPN will undergo a routine maintenance window tonight.

🕙 Scheduled Time:
  • Start: 10:00 PM IST
  • End: 11:30 PM IST

🔧 What will happen:
  • The VPN server will restart.
  • All new connections will be temporarily unavailable.
  • Existing sessions will be terminated and re‑established automatically after the restart.

📌 Impact:
  • Internet access via VPN will be down during the window.
  • Please plan your work accordingly and avoid any critical VPN‑dependent tasks during this time.

💡 What you can do:
  • Save your work and log out of the VPN before 9:45 PM.
  • If you need to access the intranet after the maintenance, reconnect using the same credentials.
  • If you encounter any issues, please reach out to the IT helpdesk at helpdesk@company.com or call 1800-123-456.

Thank you for your cooperation and understanding. This maintenance is essential for keeping our network secure and reliable.

Best Regards,

Arun Sharma
IT Operations Lead

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Shipment Fee Pending – Immediate Payment Needed
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your recent shipment with FedEx has been marked as "Missed Delivery". As per our policy, a missed delivery fee of INR 1,200 is now due.

⚠️ Immediate Action Required:
  1. Verify the address details and confirm if you are available to receive the package.
  2. Pay the missed delivery fee within 48 hours to avoid automatic return of the parcel.
  3. If the fee is not paid, your package will be returned to the sender, incurring additional charges.

To proceed, please click the link below and provide the required payment details:

<URL>

Once the payment is confirmed, you will receive a confirmation email with the new delivery schedule.

If you believe this message is in error, please contact our customer support at 1800-800-1234 or reply to this email.

Thank you for choosing FedEx. We value your business and are committed to ensuring your package reaches you safely.

Sincerely,

FedEx Customer Support
Customer Care Team
